name: bedtime-heat-setback-fan-off
description: Bedtime deactivates running fan and applies heat setback (comfort 70 - depth 4 = 66)

verdict.summary: Verifies bedtime stops the fan and applies the default-depth heat setback
verdict.observed_behavior: fan_off then setback_applied at target_temp=66 — setback is the dominant outcome
verdict.expected_behavior: fan_off then setback_applied at target_temp=66 — setback is the dominant outcome

assertions.reason: bedtime: comfort_heat(70) - DEFAULT_SETBACK_DEPTH_F(4) + modifier(0) = 66, clamped above setback_heat(60)
